companyName: Mount Logan Capital Inc. 8.00% Notes Due 2031
description: Mount Logan Capital, Inc. engages in the provision of public and private debt securities and insurance products. It operates through the Asset Management and Insurance segments. The Asset Management segment, through its subsidiaries, offers investment management, monitoring, and other services to investment vehicles and advisers. The Insurance segment consists of long-term care policies. The company was founded on April 25, 1969 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
